query: Could you help me create a 7-day travel plan starting on March 18th, 2022, and ending on March 24th, 2022? The trip will start in Washington and I would like to visit 3 cities in Minnesota. This trip is for one person with a budget of $7,200.

plan.attraction: Paul Bunyan & Babe the Blue Ox Statues; Headwaters Science Center;
plan.dinner: Chao Chinese Bistro - Holiday Inn Jaipur City Centre, Bemidji
plan.accommodation: Sunny bedroom off Prospect Park, Bemidji

plan.attraction: Diamond Point Park; Beltrami County History Center; Cameron Park;
plan.lunch: Outback Bar and Grill - Leisure Inn, Bemidji
plan.accommodation: Sunny bedroom off Prospect Park, Bemidji

plan.transportation: Flight F3847879, from Bemidji to Minneapolis
plan.attraction: Minneapolis Sculpture Garden; Minneapolis Institute of Art;
plan.accommodation: Light-filled Apartment in great area, close 2 all!, Minneapolis

plan.attraction: Mill City Museum; Minnehaha Falls; Gold Medal Park;
plan.dinner: Purani Dilli's Al Karam Kebab House, Minneapolis
plan.accommodation: Light-filled Apartment in great area, close 2 all!, Minneapolis

plan.transportation: Flight F3805786, from Minneapolis to Duluth
plan.attraction: Glensheen Mansion; Lake Superior Railroad Museum; Enger Park;
plan.accommodation: Stylish Large 2 Bedroom, Perfect Location, Duluth

plan.attraction: Great Lakes Aquarium; Duluth Lakewalk; Lake Superior Zoo;
plan.dinner: Blue - Rooftop Cafe Restaurant Bistro, Duluth
plan.accommodation: Stylish Large 2 Bedroom, Perfect Location, Duluth
